description: A key supplier has sent their monthly statement of account. An AP clerk needs to reconcile it with the company's own records to ensure everything is aligned.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the document sent by the vendor.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the vendor's account history (invoices and payments) from the company's ERP system for the same period.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls the internal record of transactions for the vendor.

nodes.task_description: Compare the two documents to identify any discrepancies, such as missing invoices or unapplied payments.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies that the vendor has not yet applied a payment that the company made last week.

nodes.task_description: Contact the vendor with the payment details to have them apply the payment and resolve the discrepancy.

expected_outcome.value: Agent drafts an email to the vendor with the payment date, amount, and check number.
